title: briza media f. lutescens
intro: Briza media f. lutescens, also known as Quaking Grass, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, due to the presence of flavonoids and other compounds. The health benefits of Quaking Grass include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Briza media f. lutescens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat skin conditions, respiratory issues, and digestive problems.
